text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 146 

MRI_CHRG_AMT 

LABEL: Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) charge amount ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) services provided 
during the beneficiary's stay. 

SHORT NAME: MRI_AMT 

LONG NAME: MRI_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the revenue
